arts.ttl: Why Gregor Rioch is so sure 'over-performing' Ryan Lowe can achieve 'the impossible dream' at Wigan Athletic
arts.sum: Ryan Lowe's proven track record for for over-performing made him the stand-out candidate when Wigan Athletic were looking for a head coach.

arts.ttl: Ryan Lowe pinpoints most pressing Wigan Athletic priority - 'It's not rocket science'
arts.sum: Ryan Lowe has admitted his most pressing priority as new Wigan Athletic head coach is 'not rocket science'.

arts.ttl: Charlton boss Nathan Jones: My comments about Greg Docherty missing Crawley Town game were tongue in cheek
arts.sum: “It was a tongue in cheek comment that when he has missed games lately, Karoy Anderson has come in, done brilliantly and we’ve won the game – so it gives you a dilemma, which sometimes could be to the skipper’s detriment. He said at the time: “I don’t know who books a caesarean the day before a game but, hey, that is what happens.

arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic boss addresses squad absence of summer signing Gassan Ahadme
arts.sum: The type of illness he had it took a lot from his body, so to put him back on the bench on Tuesday was probably a day or two too early. The Addicks paid a transfer fee for the Ipswich Town striker in the summer but he has not featured in a League One match since the 2-1 win over Wycombe at the end of December, coming on in the 81st minute.
